name: new-and-used-car-estimator
description: Single-page benchmark price guide for new and used vehicles.

scripts.check: node --check estimator.js && node --check scripts/smoke-estimator.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('firebase.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.firebaserc','utf8')); console.log('config ok')"
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run check && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project new-and-used-car-estimator --account solidartentertainment@gmail.com
